META_DESCRIPTION: Link your Shopify store to your FastComments account.
HEADING: Link Your Store
DESCRIPTION: We detected your Shopify store. To enable commenting on your store pages, we need to link it to your FastComments account.
WHAT_HAPPENS_TEXT: Once linked, you'll get a Tenant ID to paste into your Shopify theme blocks. That's it, comments will appear on your store.
MANAGE_DOMAINS_NOTE: You can manage your connected domains anytime from
